pr.title: Record: 1.0722 BPB — Improved TTT + HedgeMixer with Per-Layer LR Groups

output.summary: TTT tweaks add per-layer LR groups, cosine chunk schedule, and extra epoch/fewer freezes atop HedgeMixer for chunk-by-chunk adaptation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Uses test-time training on scored chunks rather than val-only regime.
techniques: Per-layer LR multipliers for mlp/attn projections
Cosine LR decay over 4 TTT epochs with only one frozen block
HedgeMixer scoring with backward-looking n-gram stats during TTT
